overview.description: The Monarch Volume Factor Global Unconstrained Index ETF (MVFG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund follows an equally-weighted index composed of equity ETFs that demonstrate positive cash flow. The fund targets ETFs with global market exposure, including emerging markets, and can toggle to Treasury ETFs in cases of market downturn MVFG was launched on Mar 6, 2024 and is issued by Monarch.
infoTable: Monarch Volume Factor Global Unconstrained Index
